metodos.codigoOriginal: Report Form SigReVis To Printer NoConsole
Report Form SigReVis To Printer Prompt NoConsole

Lparameters pSNT,lcNomeFrm1

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)
	
	lcQryPar = [Select GrPadVens From SigCdPam]	

	If (.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQryPar, 'crSigCdPam') < 1)
		=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (LocalMccr)')
		Return 0
	EndIf

	pGru = Alltrim(crSigCdPam.GrPadVens)
	thisform.antgru = pGru

Private pDtI, pDtF

pGru = thisform.antgru 

ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdEmp', 'crSigCdEmp', 'Cemps', _Empr, 'Razas')
m.lcEmpresa = _Empr + Iif(Eof('crSigCdEmp'), '', crSigCdEmp.Razas)
m.ldDatai   = ThisForm.getDatai.Value
m.ldDataf   = ThisForm.getDataf.Value
m.lcCconta  = ThisForm.getCdConta.Value
m.lcDconta  = ThisForm.getDsConta.Value

If (This.Value <> 3)
	If (ThisForm.getDatai.Value > ThisForm.getDataf.Value)
		=Messagebox('Data Final Menor Que a Inicial!!!', 16, '')
		ThisForm.getDataf.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf
EndIf

If Used('cMovto1')
	Use In cMovto1
EndIf

If Used('cMovto2')

frmrelatorio::btnReport.Click
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Local loLista

lcGru = thisform.antgru
If Not IsEmpty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdCli', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'iclis', This.Value, 'Seleçăo de Representante', .T.,'','Grupos = ?lcGru')

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('iclis', '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('rclis', '', 'Nome')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = crListaRemota.Iclis
	ThisForm.getDsRepr.Value = crListaRemota.rclis

	Use In crListaRemota
